title: Replacing stale Confluence with an AI-driven in-repo knowledge base
excerpt: Why we moved documentation out of VPN-gated Confluence and into the codebase, and how Claude keeps it current.
author: profile

blocks.text:
## The problem
Our Confluence docs went stale. Pages weren't updated, the codebase stayed the source of truth, and discoverability inside the repo was poor.
This post is an example document demonstrating every block type the blog schema supports.

blocks.source: graph TD; A[Codebase] --> B[In-repo README]; C[Claude] -->|generates / updates| B; B -->|reviewed by| D[Engineer]; D -->|publishes| B;
blocks.caption: The generate → review → publish loop
Docs moved closer to the code

blocks.text: Bring the knowledge to where the work happens.

seo.title: AI-driven in-repo knowledge base
seo.description: Moving docs out of stale Confluence and into the codebase, kept current by Claude.

provenance.sourcePrompt: Draft a blog post about our AI-driven in-repo knowledge base experiment.
